parameters.jsCode: const input = $('Normalize Input Demand Forecast2').first().json; const raw = $('Call Demand Forecast Model API2').first().json || {}; const result = raw.result || {}; const historical = Array.isArray(result.historical_points) ? result.historical_points : []; const forecast = Array.isArray(result.forecast_points) ? result.forecast_points : []; const peak = Array.isArray(result.peak_forecast_months) ? result.peak_forecast_months : [...forecast].sort((a, b) => Number(b.predicted_demand || 0) - Number(a.predicted_demand || 0)).slice(0, 3); const histVals = historical.map((p) => Number(p.demand || 0)); const fcVals = forecast.map((p) => Number(p.predicted_demand || 0)); const cityFilterApplied = result.city_filter_applied !== false; const eventTypeFilterApplied = result.event_type_filter_applied !== false; const avgHistory = histVals.length ? (histVals.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / histVals.length) : 0; const lastHistory = histVals.length ? histVals[histVals.length - 1] : avgHistory; const firstForecast = fcVals.length ? fcVals[0] : 0; const lastForecast = fcVals.length ? fcVals[fcVals.length - 1] : firstForecast; const maxForecast = fcVals.length ? Math.max(...fcVals) : 0; const growthPct = avgHistory > 0 ? ((firstForecast - avgHistory) / avgHistory) * 100 : 0; const horizonChangePct = firstForecast > 0 ? ((lastForecast - firstForecast) / firstForecast) * 100 : 0; let pressure = 'Low'; if (growthPct >= 35 || horizonChangePct >= 20) pressure = 'High'; else if (growthPct >= 15 || horizonChangePct >= 8) pressure = 'Medium'; const actions = { pricing: pressure === 'High' ? 'increase_5_to_10_percent' : pressure === 'Medium' ? 'hold_or_increase_3_percent' : 'run_promotional_offer', staffing: pressure === 'High' ? 'add_extra_shift_or_temp_staff' : pressure === 'Medium' ? 'prepare_flexible_shift' : 'optimize_current_staffing', marketing: pressure === 'Low' ? 'boost_campaign_for_low_months' : 'focus_on_conversion_quality' }; const alerts = []; const threshold = Number(input.alert_peak_threshold || 25); if (Math.abs(growthPct) >= threshold) alerts.push(`Demand variation ${growthPct.toFixed(1)}% vs recent history (threshold ${threshold}%).`); if (String(input.city || '').trim() && !cityFilterApplied) alerts.push('City filter not applied (no exact historical match).'); if (String(input.event_type || '').trim() && !eventTypeFilterApplied) alerts.push('Event type filter not applied (no exact historical match).'); if (!historical.length) alerts.push('Historical points are empty or insufficient.'); return [{ json: { ...input, city: result.city ?? input.city, event_type: result.event_type ?? input.event_type, trend: String(result.trend || 'Stable'), insight: String(result.insight || ''), historical_points: historical, forecast_points: forecast, peak_forecast_months: peak, demand_pressure: pressure, city_filter_applied: cityFilterApplied, event_type_filter_applied: eventTypeFilterApplied, kpis: { avg_history_demand: Number(avgHistory.toFixed(2)), last_history_demand: Number(lastHistory.toFixed(2)), first_predicted_demand: Number(firstForecast.toFixed(2)), last_predicted_demand: Number(lastForecast.toFixed(2)), max_predicted_demand: Number(maxForecast.toFixed(2)), growth_percent: Number(growthPct.toFixed(2)), horizon_change_percent: Number(horizonChangePct.toFixed(2)) }, actions, alerts } }];

const base = $('Build Forecast Intelligence2').first().json; let ai = {}; try { ai = $('Call Chat API Forecast').first().json || {}; } catch (e) { ai = {}; } if (!ai.reply && !ai.output && !ai.text && !ai.content) { try { ai = $('AI Disabled Fallback Forecast2').first().json || ai; } catch (e) {} } const aiText = String(ai.reply || ai.output || ai.text || ai.content || '').trim(); let parsed = null; try { const match = aiText.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (match) parsed = JSON.parse(match[0]); } catch (e) { parsed = null; } if (!parsed) { parsed = { executive_summary: `Demand trend ${base.trend || 'Stable'} with pressure ${base.demand_pressure || 'Low'}.`, priority_actions: [String(base.actions?.pricing || 'hold_pricing'), String(base.actions?.staffing || 'optimize_staffing'), String(base.actions?.marketing || 'focus_marketing')], risk_watchlist: Array.isArray(base.alerts) ? base.alerts.slice(0, 3) : [] }; } return [{ json: { success: true, run_source: base.run_source, city: base.city || '', event_type: base.event_type || '', forecast_horizon: base.forecast_horizon, trend: base.trend, insight: base.insight, historical_points: base.historical_points || [], forecast_points: base.forecast_points || [], peak_forecast_months: base.peak_forecast_months || [], demand_pressure: base.demand_pressure, kpis: base.kpis || {}, actions: base.actions || {}, alerts: base.alerts || [], ai_insight: String(parsed.executive_summary || ''), priority_actions: Array.isArray(parsed.priority_actions) ? parsed.priority_actions : [], risk_watchlist: Array.isArray(parsed.risk_watchlist) ? parsed.risk_watchlist : [], raw_text: String(aiText || ''), generated_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];
